query:
SELECT p.id, p.title, COUNT(pi.id) as image_count 
FROM properties p 
INNER JOIN property_images pi ON p.id = pi.propertyId 
GROUP BY p.id 
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3wsSeNnMFw5dboG.2c4b3d36d2f1 --database aSHZEBwUmWTuA7HAwuTg3z --execute SELECT p.id, p.title, COUNT(pi.id) as image_count 
FROM properties p 
INNER JOIN property_images pi ON p.id = pi.propertyId
